skills.name: karpathy-guidelines
skills.note: Provided outside this repo (installed agent plugin); non-path sources are listed but not validated or linked by repo tooling.
skills.reason: Bias coding work toward simple, surgical, verified changes.

skills.name: git-cli-workflow
skills.reason: Use local git and gh CLI for repository, PR, issue, and CI work without MCP.

skills.name: oh-my-setting-ops
skills.reason: Let agents maintain the oh-my-setting install, cleanup legacy links, and run doctors from chat.

skills.name: agent-harness
skills.reason: Share harness memory across agents and call one local agent CLI for a read-only independent pass.

skills.name: spec-interview
skills.reason: Interview and write a spec before coding unclear or broad requests.

skills.name: multi-agent-review
skills.reason: Use independent agent/reviewer lenses for high-risk changes.

skills.name: multi-agent-ask
skills.reason: Ask Codex, Claude Code, and Antigravity the same conceptual question and synthesize perspectives.

skills.name: multi-agent-delegate
skills.reason: Delegate a scoped write task to another agent CLI in an isolated worktree and review the returned patch.

skills.name: slurm-hpc
skills.reason: Generate and use local Slurm cluster context for HPC workflows.

skills.name: tsp-queue
skills.reason: Queue single-workstation GPU jobs with tsp/task-spooler and ledger-recorded completion.

skills.name: ml-training
skills.reason: Load PyTorch training defaults (optimizer, scheduler, DDP, checkpoint) on demand instead of carrying them in global rules.

skills.name: chem-bio-ml
skills.reason: Domain guardrails for molecule/protein ML: splitting/leakage, label semantics, metrics, and featurization conventions.

skills.name: research-method
skills.reason: Hypothesis-driven experiment loop: falsifiable hypothesis, pre-registered metric, baseline, ledger-recorded result, anti-pattern guard.
